content.text:
<user_query>
Read the following files and extract key terminology, feature names, and product specifications found in them. These are product marketing Meet/Spec documents.

Read these files:
1. c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\Meet&Spec 文件\OpenFit Pro\(English) OpenFit Pro MEET.pptx
2. c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\Meet&Spec 文件\OpenFit Pro\(French) OpenFit Pro MEET.pptx
3. c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\Meet&Spec 文件\OpenSwim Pro\[French] OPENSWIM PRO_MEET.pdf
4. c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\Meet&Spec 文件\OpenRun Pro 2\[French] OpenRun Pro 2 Spec_202510.pptx

For each file, list:
- Product name and language
- Key feature terms, technology names, spec terminology
- How features are described in that language

Return a detailed summary comparing English vs French terminology patterns.
</user_query>

正在查找这些文档的可读文本（或已导出的 Markdown），并尝试读取各文件内容。

[REDACTED]

正在用只读方式从 PPTX（ZIP 内 XML）和 PDF 提取文本，因这些二进制文件无法直接以可读形式打开。

[REDACTED]
